assertions.assertion: Calls ConfigureDPoPTokensForScheme with the scheme name 'token' on builder.Services (IServiceCollection), NOT inside AddJwtBearer lambda
assertions.rationale: Code calls builder.Services.ConfigureDPoPTokensForScheme("token") as a separate call on IServiceCollection, outside the AddJwtBearer lambda.

assertions.assertion: Registers a distributed cache (e.g., AddDistributedMemoryCache for dev, mentions Redis or similar for production)
assertions.rationale: Code calls builder.Services.AddDistributedMemoryCache() and explains to use Redis/SQL Server/CosmosDB in production.

assertions.assertion: Configures AddJwtBearer with Authority and ValidTypes including 'at+jwt'
assertions.rationale: Code configures AddJwtBearer with Authority = 'https://identity.example.com' and ValidTypes = new[] { 'at+jwt' }.
Response includes 'dotnet add package Duende.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer' and a using statement.
